chunks.text: I am no longer able to reply individually to the large number of messages from students who are interested in graduate study at Berkeley. PLEASE do not send me messages describing your qualifications etc. Please apply to the PhD program through

ons etc. Please apply to the PhD program through the normal process . Admission decisions are made by the Admissions Committee. Only the Admissions committee can evaluate your qualifications. I will be happy to discuss research and/or supervision

be happy to discuss research and/or supervision with you once you have been admitted. In the interests of fairness, I will not usually be able to meet with prospective students who have not yet been admitted. If you are interested in finding out
en admitted. If you are interested in finding out what research goes on in my group, please read our publications . (Borrowed from S. Russell)
